parameters.jsCode:
const body = items[0].json.body || items[0].json || {};
return [{ json: { content_item_id: body.content_item_id || null, source: 'webhook' } }];

parameters.query:
-- HARD GUARD: only approved content may proceed. Never trust upstream trigger alone.
-- IDEMPOTENCY: skip if postiz_post_id already set or posts row exists (webhook retries).
-- STAGING: production publishes only when campaign.environment = production AND is_staging = false
--   (override with env ALLOW_STAGING_PUBLISH=true for dry post tests).
SELECT ci.*, c.name AS campaign_name, c.is_staging, c.environment
FROM content_items ci
JOIN campaigns c ON c.id = ci.campaign_id
WHERE ci.status = 'approved'
  AND ci.postiz_post_id IS NULL
  AND (
    ($1::uuid IS NOT NULL AND ci.id = $1::uuid)
    OR (
      $1::uuid IS NULL
      AND (ci.scheduled_time IS NULL OR ci.scheduled_time <= now())
    )
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM posts p
    WHERE p.content_item_id = ci.id
      AND p.status IN ('scheduled','live')
  )
ORDER BY ci.scheduled_time NULLS FIRST, ci.approved_at ASC
LIMIT 20;

INSERT INTO agent_actions_log (agent_name, action_type, entity_type, entity_id, payload, result)
VALUES (
  'publisher',
  'abort_not_approved_or_empty',
  'content_item',
  $1::uuid,
  $2::jsonb,
  'skipped'
)
RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Normalize Webhook').isExecuted ? $('Normalize Webhook').item.json.content_item_id : null, JSON.stringify({ reason: 'No approved content_items ready to publish. Guard clause enforced.' }) ] }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, published: 0, message: 'No approved items to publish (or not yet due). Guard clause: status must be approved in DB.' } }}

parameters.query:
SELECT postiz_integration_id, postiz_settings, channel, is_active
FROM channel_integrations
WHERE channel = $1 AND is_active = true
LIMIT 1;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $json.content_item_id, $('Load Approved Only').item.json.campaign_id, $('Load Approved Only').item.json.channel, $json.reason, JSON.stringify({ reason: $json.reason }) ] }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO posts (
  content_item_id, campaign_id, postiz_post_id, channel, posted_at, status
) VALUES (
  $1::uuid, $2::uuid, $3, $4, now(), $5
)
ON CONFLICT (content_item_id) DO UPDATE SET
  postiz_post_id = EXCLUDED.postiz_post_id,
  status = EXCLUDED.status,
  posted_at = EXCLUDED.posted_at,
  last_error = NULL
RETURNING *;

UPDATE content_items
SET status = 'posted', postiz_post_id = $3
WHERE id = $1::uuid;

UPDATE campaigns SET status = 'active'
WHERE id = $2::uuid AND status IN ('content_in_progress', 'strategy_ready');

INSERT INTO agent_actions_log (agent_name, action_type, entity_type, entity_id, payload, result)
VALUES (
  'publisher',
  'publish_post',
  'content_item',
  $1::uuid,
  $6::jsonb,
  'success'
);

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, message: 'Publisher run complete. Check agent_actions_log and posts table for per-item results.' } }}
